contents.text: At SkyAttack, we naturally place a lot of emphasis on providing an engaging multiplayer experience—but this is entirely optional. Each player can either create their own island or join another player’s island.
Not sure which island your partner has? No problem — each player can check their own island number at any time under their Stats tab in the menu.
Since all players are in the same world, you can later build together at your shared base or take your own paths — the choice is yours.
